# 公式写法

### QL表达式写法


**写法总结: JDK+弱类型**


[图片1: null]

**校验逻辑写法1**


```
match = false;
if（state_machine_code=="WF_ENGINEERING_CHANGE_REQUEST"){//单层变量直接写出来
  if（COVER_PAGE.CHANGE_TYPE=="CPLM_BOM_BOM_CHANGE_TYPE_3"){//多层变量用“.”分割
      if（COVER_PAGE.CHANGE_SUB_TYPE=="CPLM_BOM_BOM_CHANGE_SUB_TYPE_1"){
          if (affected_item_group != null) {
    for (i = 0; i < affected_item_group.size(); i++) {
        item = affected_item_group.get(i);
        if (item.LIFECYCLE == "b3d41882e1254614a3a1db69df37ac01" || item.classId == "e50f2d6a7fe04fa291370f11b2cbc7f7") {
            match = true;
            break;
        }
    }
      }

    }
  }
}

return match;

```


**校验逻辑写法2**


```
match = false;

    if(state_machine_code == "WF_ENGINEERING_CHANGE_REQUEST"){ //单层变量直接写出来
        match = true;
    }
    if(COVER_PAGE.CHANGE_TYPE == "CPLM_BOM_BOM_CHANGE_TYPE_3"){//多层变量用“.”分割
        match = true;
    }
    if(COVER_PAGE.CHANGE_SUB_TYPE == "CPLM_BOM_BOM_CHANGE_SUB_TYPE_1"){
        if (affected_item_group != null) {
            isAllMATCH = true;
            for (i = 0; i < affected_item_group.size(); i++) {
                    item = affected_item_group.get(i);
                    if (item.LIFECYCLE != "CPLM_OBJ_LIFECYCLE_MIDDLEPILOT") {
                        isAllMATCH = false;
                        break;
                    }
            }
            match = isAllMATCH;
        }
    }


    return match;
```


以上公式对应的业务数据JSON如下


```
{
  "COVER_PAGE": {
    "CRT_TIME": 1764904012000,
    "CONSISTENT_PERFORMANCE": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO_1",
    "BUSINESS_RESP": ["wubijun"],
    "NUMBER": "ECR-0000006",
    "CRT_USER": "wubijun",
    "IS_ORDER_LIMITED": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO_0",
    "IS_CLIENT_CONFIRM": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO_1",
    "EVALUATOR": ["wubijun"],
    "SAFETY_REQ": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO_1",
    "CLASS": "9f98eec2dde54ee384199123508442fb",
    "CHANGE_IMPLEMENT_METHOD": "CPLM_BOM_CHANGE_IMPLEMENT_METHOD_5",
    "CHANGE_SUB_TYPE": "CPLM_BOM_BOM_CHANGE_SUB_TYPE_3",
    "PERF_TEST_ITEMS_AFFECTED": "安师大",
    "CONSISTENT_STRUCTURE": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO_1",
    "APL_RD_ORG": "39",
    "CHANGE_TYPE": "CPLM_BOM_BOM_CHANGE_TYPE_3",
    "STATUS": "CPLM_OBJ_CHANGE_STATUS_1",
    "IS_AFFECT_SW": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO_1",
    "DESCRIPTION": "安师大",
    "CONSISTENT_APPEARANCE": "CPLM_OBJ_COMM_YESNO_1",
    "SW_EVALUATION": "于",
    "WORKFLOW": "40f3e1f58ed34a9c8c6e4c23eb0e9908"
  },
  "transaction_id": "19aec7a087b05b49b436f494e118db41",
  "state_machine_p_task_id": "-1",
  "RELATION": {},
  "state_convert_reason_type": "提交",
  "affected_item_group": [
    {
      "NUMBER": "016.005.0011048",
      "classApiName": "CVTE_016005_06_PRODUCT_CLASS",
      "CLASS": "aa2f240ce5f54f43aeac5ac7039d2379",
      "fileCount": 0,
      "itemId": "79da1a43e1eb40168d7fa1bec3492897",
      "versionId": "deaf850ffc2f4212ba4056b0db4c0c61",
      "classId": "aa2f240ce5f54f43aeac5ac7039d2379",
      "viewName": "设计",
      "DESCRIPTION": "外购",
      "LIFECYCLE": "CPLM_OBJ_LIFECYCLE_PROTOTYPE",
      "BOM_TYPE": "CPLM_OBJ_BOM_TYPE_6",
      "mark": 0
    }
  ],
  "state_machine_code": "WF_ENGINEERING_CHANGE_REQUEST",
  "state_machine_workflow_type": "integrated",
  "state_machine_system_code": "CPLM-OBJECT",
  "BOM_CHANGE_DETAIL_MAINTAIN": {},
  "state_machine_process_crt_name": "吴碧君",
  "state_machine_version": 1,
  "state_machine_process_id": "3485570b4385430e9f26a7cc49736dbf",
  "state_machine_process_crt_account": "wubijun",
  "ATTACHMENTS": {},
  "original_event_code": "submit",
  "state_machine_def_id": "2e3cd5043ce541e585c9083f906f8ba8",
  "state_convert_reason": "机器节点自动处理",
  "current_event_name": "WF_ENGINEERING_CHANGE_REQUEST",
  "state_machine_task_id": "3485570b4385430e9f26a7cc49736dbf",
  "WORKFLOW": {},
  "BOM_CHANGE_DETAIL_RECORD": {},
  "HISTORY": {}
}
```
